Retail

Retail WiFi that turns footfall into customer data and repeat sales.

Third-party cookies are no longer reliable and attribution from physical visits is harder than ever. Purple gives retail customers a consented, first-party data set built from every guest WiFi login, captured through a branded captive portal, with the Purple app powering opt-in and repeat recognition for returning shoppers.

A consented, first-party database built from every login
Loyalty sign-up routed straight from the splash page
Repeat shoppers recognized automatically in-app
The conversation

What your customer is dealing with right now.

No visibility on who walks through the doors

Purple captures opted-in profile and demographic data the moment shoppers connect, age, gender, interests, and visit behavior, so a customer can build a single customer view and market to it.

Shop floor staff and POS devices sharing one WiFi password

Till systems, handheld scanners, and staff devices all need reliable access, but a shared password that never rotates is a security gap waiting to happen. Staff WiFi ties access to identity, so leavers lose access automatically and every device authenticates on its own credential.

No way to know if the emails you're capturing are even real

Fake, misspelled, and disposable email addresses dilute the database and skew every campaign. Verify checks every address in real time at the point of login, so the database a retailer builds is one the marketing team can actually use.

Where Purple fits

The products that solve it.

GUEST WIFI
Turn footfall into a first-party database

Branded portal or seamless connection via the Purple app, capturing opted-in profile and demographic data the moment shoppers connect. Build a single customer view, and market to it.

Branded captive portal or seamless connection
STAFF WIFI
One shared password problem, solved

WPA3-Enterprise ties till systems, handheld scanners, and staff devices to identity, so leavers lose access automatically and every device authenticates on its own credential.

Works with Entra ID, Google & Okta
Marketing support

Need co-branded materials for retail?

Request sector-specific campaign packs, one-pagers, and co-branded assets for retail deals, including Purple app collateral you can hand straight to a prospect.

Ready to add Purple to your portfolio?

Join 80,000+ venues already running on Purple. No targets, no minimums, just bigger deals.
